description.value: You've studied music and color theory; you understand the necessary function of art while removing any ambiguous subtext, metaphor, and even the very soul that makes it art. You can use Society in place of Performance when you use the [[/act perform skill=society]] action and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Earn Income] downtime activity. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Create Forgery] to replicate digital works of art (such as pictures, movies, and songs).
